channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Microsoft’s stock selloff is approaching a critical crossroads unseen in over 10 years
item.description: Shares of Microsoft are less than 3% above their 200-week moving average, which has provided key technical support in the past.

item.title: Stop muzzling the 1%: The wealthy have a right to free speech — and democracy needs billionaires
item.description: Bashing the rich won’t fix inequality — it simply gives power to elites who already control the agenda.

item.title: 9 of the stock market’s 10 most-watched valuation indicators are now in ‘sell’ territory
item.description: Indicators are at extremes — stretched valuations are bearish for stocks.

item.title: Why more CEOs are chatting directly with customers
item.description: Executives say it’s all about learning how to better run their businesses, but some corporate watchers question if this is just a PR move.

item.title: Constellation Energy’s stock zooms toward highest level in weeks, even after outlook is postponed
item.description: Constellation Energy is keeping investors waiting for its yearly guidance, saying it will provide it in March. But that hasn’t dented the independent ...

item.title: Bitcoin mining is no longer profitable after crypto's latest downward turn, analyst says
item.description: Bitcoin briefly sank below $63,000 on Tuesday, dragging down its miners alongside it.

item.title: Loop Capital upgrades this semiconductor stock as key headwinds ease and its strategy diversifies
item.description: Loop Capital sees shares of Qualcomm surging 32% from here.

item.title: Watch these chart formations for clues into what's next for market volatility
item.description: Despite talk of the great rotation out of growth and technology and into value and defensive areas, the Nasdaq 100 is only 4.5% off its all-time high.

item.title: The violent software sell-off pauses. Wall Street says bet on these stocks to bounce
item.description: Some analysts believe the sell-off is overdone in companies across cybersecurity and traditional software, opening up buying opportunities.

item.title: BlackRock’s Rick Rieder is locking in attractive yields in this corner of the bond market before the opportunity slips away
item.description: BlackRock's Rick Rieder tells CNBC where he is investing for income right now and why he thinks the opportunity may not last.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
